content_body: Jeeped up and excited to visit with old friends, three couples ascended to the All Inspired Lodge. You truly do have a wonderful place here. This destination became the third in a new annual tradition of our group coming together and reuniting. We enjoyed some jeep trails, some local shopping/dining, and of course some Grumpy Old Men Brewing. Having a comfortable base to hangout at was key to a great reunion. Thank you for offering up this great place for the taking!  -The Westgaters
title: Comfortable Place To Hangout
